detail.description:
Echocalypse 2.5 Year Anniversary is going live on May 16! New MR Case Honorblade Chiraha debuts with her Oath Outfit [Gentle Drink]. Past memories, present bonds, and the path ahead—the future awaits you! Log in to select a UR Case, exclusive Vibration Arm, and Neolith for free! Sign up for Iridimorphite and massive rewards! Newbie benefits upgraded: sign-in to obtain an MR Case of your choice! Awakener, are you ready for the gala?
